notes: Steam Proton not required - native client available for linux.
title: Tower Unite

notes:
Linux branch is no longer available (devs took it down pending Unreal Engine updates); must download via Windows Steam as Linux client will download broken Linux branch

Lobby and minigames work as expected without tweaking. Some stutters are encountered in the lobby.

Prevalent sound issues. Some incorrect sound effects are loaded (uses real gun effect for confetti gun) and some sounds are overbearingly loud.

Areas such as casino overlap many sound effects and do not respect distance. All sound effects in these areas are projected as if a few feet away from your character and are extremely loud even with main volume set to 1%. Casino games do not play sound effects as they should when you press buttons.
title: Tower Unite

notes: I can't confirm that windows files work with proton but the native windows version does not exist as stated with the last report. There is a Linux beta but it says its broken. Native support stated to be planned for after early access.
title: Tower Unite

notes: Linux Native is an empty repo with no executable. Windows version crashes on starting loading screen.
title: Tower Unite
